text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home from the Gold class briefing
session, I spot a trainer's notebook lying on the
road.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glancing inside, I see it's filled with detailed
information about the owner's trainee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not just their training schedule either, but also
their love for aquariums, their favorite restaurants
and several associated recipes...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Good job, Meek. Let's finish here today.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
All right...
Um...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Yes? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: About dinner... What do you... want to eat?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Looking at your recent dietary intake, it
seems a little lacking in fat.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Let's cook something up to fix that!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And I'll add in some of your favourite foods,
of course.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Enjoying your food is just as important as
nutritional balance!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Now, you'd better change your clothes before
you get cold. I'll join you soon.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer <username>.
It's nice to see you again.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I heard through the grapevine that
<chrname> has reached Gold class!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we just achieved the same thing. Hehe,
I'm honored to reach such an elite class at the
same time as you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Even so, we still have a long way to go. But don't
you worry—we're working harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Happy Meek has also reached Gold class,
Trainer Kiryuin must have been at the briefing
session earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And given the contents of this notebook, there's
no mistake. I take out the trainer's notebook and
show it to her.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah... So that's where it went!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I couldn't find it after I got back from
the briefing session, and I was looking
everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I dropped it on the way back from
an official meeting... How embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mention that I guessed it was hers based on the
details inside.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's the advice you gave me in action.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Every time I learn more about Meek, I'm so happy
that I end up writing pages and pages.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: It's just...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, nothing! Ahaha, nothing to see here.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Right, training's over! Time to clean up!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
See you around,
Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how abruptly Trainer Kiryuin bails on the
conversation, it's hard not to feel concerned.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I just don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Why is Meek making so little progress?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
There shouldn't be any problems with her training
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The previous generations of the Kiryuin family all
achieved results by following the directions in the
Trainer's Handbook.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume trained using this handbook have
gone on to win G1 races and receive countless
accolades... It's the accumulation of generations
of wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And Meek isn't falling short, either in motivation
or ability.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So the weak link must be...
